content.explanation:
**Letter Writing — पत्र लेखन:**

**TWO TYPES OF LETTERS:**

**1. Formal Letter:**
• Business letters, official communication
• Strict format, professional language
• To companies, officials, banks, etc.

**2. Informal Letter:**
• Personal letters to friends, family
• Casual language, no strict format
• Begin with "Dear [Name]," and end with "Yours lovingly / With love"

**FORMAL LETTER FORMAT:**
Sender's Address → Date → Receiver's Address → Subject → Dear Sir/Madam → Body (3 paras) → Yours faithfully → Signature

**INFORMAL LETTER FORMAT:**
[Your address] → [Date] → Dear [Friend's name], → Body (freely written) → With love/Yours truly → [Your name]

**Key Phrases for Formal Letters:**
• "I am writing with reference to..." (शुरुआत)
• "I would like to bring to your attention..."
• "I look forward to hearing from you." (end)
• "Please do not hesitate to contact me."
rules: Formal: Yours faithfully (Sir/Madam) / Yours sincerely (Dear Mr./Ms.)
Informal: Yours lovingly / With warm regards / Take care
Formal: no contractions, no slang, complex vocabulary
Informal: contractions OK, casual phrases, simple vocabulary
Both types: Date format — 15th March 2025 OR 15 March 2025
Subject line: only in formal letters (not in informal)
Formal salutation: "Dear Sir/Madam" — Informal: "Dear Rahul" / "Hey Priya"
content.memoryTrick:
**FORMAL vs INFORMAL = SUIT vs T-SHIRT 👔👕**
Formal = Business suit (strict, professional, no fun)
Informal = T-shirt (relaxed, personal, casual)

Formal ending: Faithfully (Sir/Madam) | Sincerely (Known name)
Informal ending: Lovingly | With love | Take care

examples.hindi: मैं इस पत्र के माध्यम से शिकायत दर्ज करना चाहता हूँ।
examples.english: I am writing this letter to lodge a formal complaint.

examples.hindi: मुझे उम्मीद है कि तुम अच्छे होगे।
examples.english: I hope you are doing well.

examples.hindi: कृपया जल्द से जल्द जवाब दें।
examples.english: I look forward to receiving your prompt reply.

examples.hindi: बहुत समय बाद पत्र लिख रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am writing to you after a long time.

examples.hindi: आपकी company के product की quality खराब है।
examples.english: I am writing to bring to your attention the poor quality of your product.

mistakes.wrong: Dear Sir, Hope you are fine.
mistakes.correct: Dear Sir, I hope this letter finds you in good health.
mistakes.why: Informal opening ('Hope you are fine') in a formal letter — use professional language
'Yours sincerely' requires knowing the person's name in the salutation

mistakes.correct: I am writing to complain about...
mistakes.why: No contractions in formal letters; 'complain' is the verb (not 'complaint')

mistakes.correct: Yours sincerely / Yours faithfully / With warm regards (choose appropriately)
mistakes.why: 'With regards' is incomplete — use full formal closing phrases

speakingTips: Practice writing both types: Write one formal and one informal letter today.
Formal read-aloud: Read your formal letter to hear if it sounds professional.
Informal: Write a letter to a friend you haven't spoken to in a year — make it genuine.

vocabulary.example: We have been in correspondence for months.
Please acknowledge receipt of this letter.
With referral to your letter dated...
I wish to address my grievance.
I request a quick resolution to this issue.

practice.hindi: मुझे उम्मीद है कि आप ठीक होंगे।
practice.english: I hope you are doing well.
alternatives: i hope this finds you in good health.
practice.hint: I hope you are + doing well

practice.hindi: मैं यह पत्र आपको यह बताने के लिए लिख रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I am writing this letter to inform you.
alternatives: i write this letter to let you know.
by means of this letter.
practice.hint: through / by means of = के माध्यम से

practice.hindi: कृपया पत्र का जवाब जल्दी दें।
practice.english: Please reply to this letter soon.
alternatives: kindly respond at the earliest.

practice.hindi: मैं आपको यह सूचित करना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to inform you about this.
alternatives: i wished to notify you of this.
my dear friend.
yours sincerely.
practice.hint: faithful / sincerely = विश्वासू / शुभकामनाओं के साथ

practice.hindi: मुझे आपकी सलाह की ज़रूरत है।
alternatives: i require your guidance.

practice.hindi: यह पत्र पाकर मुझे बहुत खुशी हुई।
practice.english: I was very happy to receive your letter.
alternatives: getting your letter made me very happy.
practice.hint: happy to receive = पाकर खुशी हुई

practice.hindi: जैसा कि तुमने अपने पत्र में लिखा।
practice.english: As you wrote in your letter.
alternatives: as you mentioned in your letter.
practice.hint: As you wrote/mentioned in your letter

practice.hindi: आशा है कि यह पत्र आप तक सकुशल पहुँचे।
practice.english: I hope this letter reaches you safely.
alternatives: i hope this mail arrives safely.
my address is given below.

practice.hindi: परिवार को मेरी तरफ से प्यार देना।
practice.english: Give my love to the family.
alternatives: convey my regards to the family.
practice.hint: give love / convey regards = प्यार देना

practice.english: We will discuss the rest when we meet.
alternatives: we will talk more when we see each other.

practice.hindi: तुम्हारी कोई भी समस्या हो, मुझसे शेयर करना।
practice.english: Feel free to share any problem with me.
alternatives: share any issue you have with me.
practice.hint: feel free to = बिना झिझक के
